name: Proof-Carrying Artifact Passport
coreLaw: Reusable capability is not copy-paste. It is a proof-carrying artifact with scope, lineage, rollback, and public/private boundaries.

conformanceLevels.name: schema-valid
conformanceLevels.meaning: Passport object validates and has a stable artifact identity.

conformanceLevels.name: proof-emitting
conformanceLevels.meaning: Artifact includes proof packets, trace roots, output hashes, cost, latency, and signatures or local demo equivalents.

conformanceLevels.name: eval-gated
conformanceLevels.meaning: Artifact has baseline comparison and evaluator decision.

conformanceLevels.name: rollbackable
conformanceLevels.meaning: Artifact includes rollback target and monitoring condition.

conformanceLevels.name: attestable
conformanceLevels.meaning: Independent evaluators can sign or review attestations.

conformanceLevels.name: production-governed
conformanceLevels.meaning: Canary, challenge window, incident log, and governance separation are present.

conformanceLevels.name: cross-institutional
conformanceLevels.meaning: Artifact can be reused across institutions without exposing private intelligence.
